INTERSECT

FROM dim_location dl
JOIN fact_establishment_totals fet ON dl.location_id = fet.location_id
JOIN dim_sector_category dsc ON fet.sector_id = dsc.sector_id

SELECT DISTINCT dl.sub_district_name

JOIN dim_sector_category dsc ON fet.sector_id = dsc.sector_id

question: Assam, Andhra Pradesh, ya Bihar states mein jo locations hain, unke liye state name, district name, aur ULB/RLB village name dikha do. Prakasam district ko exclude kar do. State, district, aur village name ke hisaab se group karo, aur phir village aur district ke alphabetical order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN ('Prakasam') GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.state_name, dd.district_name, dl.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location dl
JOIN dim_district dd ON dl.district_id = dd.district_id
JOIN dim_state ds ON dd.state_id = ds.state_id
WHERE ds.state_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar'])
  AND dd.district_name NOT ILIKE 'Prakasam'
GROUP BY ds.state_name, dd.district_name, dl.ulb_rlb_village_name
ORDER BY dl.ulb_rlb_village_name, dd.district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.state_name, dd.district_name, dl.ulb_rlb_village_name
FROM dim_location dl
JOIN dim_district dd ON dl.district_id = dd.district_id
JOIN dim_state ds ON dd.state_id = ds.state_id
WHERE ds.state_name ILIKE ANY (ARRAY['Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar'])
  AND dd.district_name NOT ILIKE 'Prakasam'
GROUP BY ds.state_name, dd.district_name, dl.ulb_rlb_village_name

gold_sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_FINANCE_GOVT_ASSISTANCE), SUM(T2.EST_FINANCE_BORROW_INSTITUTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCE_SOURCES AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_FINANCE_GOVT_ASSISTANCE) DESC

question: Sabse recent census year ke liye, har sub-district ka naam list karo jisme Hindus ke total establishments, Muslims ke total establishments, aur Christians ke total establishments ho, aur in teeno religious ownership categories ke combined sum ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_OWNED_BY_HINDU), SUM(T2.EST_OWNED_BY_ISLAM), SUM(T2.EST_OWNED_BY_CHRISTIAN) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_RELIGIOUS_OWNERSHIP AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_OWNED_BY_HINDU + T2.EST_OWNED_BY_ISLAM + T2.EST_OWNED_BY_CHRISTIAN) DESC
predicted_sql:
WITH latest_year AS (
    SELECT MAX(census_year) AS latest_census_year
    FROM dim_time
),
religious_totals AS (
    SELECT
        dl.sub_district_name,
        SUM(fro.est_owned_by_hindu) AS total_hindu,
        SUM(fro.est_owned_by_islam) AS total_muslim,
        SUM(fro.est_owned_by_christian) AS total_christian,
        (SUM(fro.est_owned_by_hindu) + SUM(fro.est_owned_by_islam) + SUM(fro.est_owned_by_christian)) AS combined_sum
    FROM fact_religious_ownership fro
    JOIN dim_location dl ON fro.location_id = dl.location_id
    JOIN dim_time dt ON fro.time_id = dt.time_id
    JOIN latest_year ly ON dt.census_year = ly.latest_census_year
    GROUP BY dl.sub_district_name
    HAVING
        SUM(fro.est_owned_by_hindu) > 0
        AND SUM(fro.est_owned_by_islam) > 0
        AND SUM(fro.est_owned_by_christian) > 0
)
SELECT
    sub_district_name,
    total_hindu,
    total_muslim,
    total_christian,
    combined_sum
FROM religious_totals
ORDER BY combined_sum DESC;
